Apple Pay vs Google Wallet

A head-to-head comparison of two of the most prominent mobile wallets — examining their technology, security model, and user experience.

Both Apple Pay and Google Wallet represent very different philosophies when it comes to mobile payments. This series digs into the technical and practical differences between the two, one topic at a time.

Table of Contents

  1. The Secure Element
  2. Lost or Stolen Scenario
  3. Purchase transaction information Coming soon
  4. Network connectivity Coming soon
  5. User Experience Coming soon
  6. Interchange rates Coming soon
  7. Revenue model Coming soon
  8. Where does it work? Coming soon

More comparisons may be added to this series in the future.

Ganesh Marwaha

Software Engineer & Head of Engineering for Virtusa. Passionate about Digital Transformation, Microservices, and Developer Experiences.
